getStartedPage.title: It’s easy to get started on {{appName}}

step1.title: 1. Tell us about your place
step1.desc: Share some basic info, like where it is and how many guests can stay.

step2.title: 2. Make it stand out
step2.desc: Add 5 or more photos plus a title and description—we’ll help you out.

step3.title: 3. Finish up and publish
step3.desc: Choose a starting price, verify a few details, then publish your listing.

basics.title: Let's start with the basics
basics.subtitle: How many people can stay here?

listingType.label: Listing Type
listingType.title: What kind of listing is this?
listingType.subtitle: Choose the model that best fits your needs.

FOR_SALE.name: Property Sale
FOR_SALE.text: List your property for sale to buyers.

step1.label: Step 1
step1.title: Tell us about your place
step1.description: In this step, we'll ask you which type of property you have and if guests will book the entire place or just a room. Then let us know the location and how many guests can stay.

step2.label: Step 2
step2.title: Make your place stand out
step2.description: In this step, you’ll add some of the amenities your place offers, plus 5 or more photos. Then you’ll create a title and description.

step3.label: Step 3
step3.title: Finish up and publish
step3.description: Finally, you’ll choose booking settings, set up pricing and publish your listing.

address.title: Confirm your address
address.desc: Your address is only shared with guests after they've made a reservation.
address.showLocationDesc: Make it clear to guests where your place is located. We'll only share your address after they've made a reservation.

propertyType.heading: Which of these best describes your place?

images.title: Choose at least 3 photos
images.subtitle: Drag to reorder
images.dropzoneLabel: Drag and drop your photos here

amenities.heading: Tell guests what your place has to offer

placeType.heading: Which type of place will guests have?

Entire Place.title: An entire place
Entire Place.desc: Guests have the whole place to themselves.

A Room.title: A room
A Room.desc: Guests have their own room in a home, plus access to shared spaces.

A Shared Room.title: A shared room
A Shared Room.desc: Guests sleep in a room or common area that may be shared with others.

title.heading: Now, let's give your house a title
title.para: Short titles work best. Have fun with it – you can always change it later.

description.heading: Create your description
description.para: Share what makes your place special.
description.placeholder: You'll have a great time at this comfortable place to stay

weekday.label: Weekday Price
weekday.heading: Now, set a weekday base price
weekday.para: Tip: Rs 2000. You’ll set a weekend price next.

weekend.label: Weekend Price
weekend.heading: Set a weekend price
weekend.para: Add a premium for Fridays and Sunday.

monthlyRent.label: Monthly Rent
monthlyRent.heading: Set monthly rent
monthlyRent.para: How much do you want to charge per month?

salePrice.label: Sale Price
salePrice.heading: Set sale price
salePrice.para: How much are you selling this property for?

pricing.weekdayWeekendExplainer: Weekdays are from Monday to Thursday, while the weekend includes Friday through Sunday.

lease.title: Lease Details
lease.subtitle: Specify the terms for your long-term rental.

sale.title: Property Sale Details
sale.subtitle: Fill in the ownership and property type details.

checkIn.title: Add check-in details
checkIn.subtitle: Guests will receive this information one day before they check in.

instructions.label: Check-in Instructions & Pre-requisites
instructions.subtitle: Tell guests how to get in, any pre-requisites (like providing ID), or other necessary things.
instructions.placeholder: Example: The key is in the lockbox code 1234. Please bring a copy of your CNIC.

preview.title: Review your listing
preview.subtitle: Here's what we'll show to guests. Make sure everything looks good.
preview.confirmTitle: Confirm a few details and publish
preview.confirmSubtitle: We’ll let you know if you need to verify your identity or register with the local government.
preview.calendarSubtitle: Choose which dates your listing is available. It will be visible 24 hours after you publish.
preview.settingsSubtitle: Set house rules, select a cancellation policy, choose how guests book and more.
preview.hostedBy: Place to stay in a home hosted by {{name}}

success.title: Success!
success.text: Your listing has been successfully created!
